_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: AIF1 immunostaining reveals the presence of infiltrating macrophages alongside Schwann cells
details: Successfully revealed the presence of infiltrating macrophages alongside Schwann cells in neurofibroma tissue
